message:
Fix 6 persistent test failures blocking coverage (#4638)

- learningVideos: update thumbnail URL assertion to match API proxy route
- AlertRuleEditor: mock deduplicatedClusters instead of clusters (PR #4582)
- BaseModal: add missing render() call in noPadding test
- ConfirmDialog: add missing render() calls in variant tests

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
